name: jjuanrivvera-plexus
description: Plexus — see, launch, attach, and inject coding-agent sessions across your machines.

plugins.name: plexus
plugins.description: One plugin that wires both Plexus tools into a Claude Code session: registers it in the plexus registry and spawns its web terminal (hooks → `plexus`), and makes it injectable by external events (channel → `edc /inject`). Bundles the `plexus` skill. Requires the `plexus` and `edc` binaries on PATH (see plexus.sh).
